api_key.description: Open Data DC (MAR 2) API key, sent as the apikey query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: Open Data DC API base URL override for tests or proxies.

location.description: Address, place, or block search term for the 'locations' stream. Required for that stream only.

marid.description: MAR id for the 'units' stream (required for that stream) and an optional filter for the 'ssls' stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
